title: Sea Salt Scented Candle, Embossed Blue Glass Jar with Lid, Double Wick, 20 Hour Burn - Luxury Coastal Fragrance Gift
features: 🌊 LUXURY COASTAL FRAGRANCE Fill your home with a crisp blend of sea salt and ocean breeze. This premium double-wick candle delivers a calm, balanced burn and a fresh coastal ambience ideal for unwinding in the evening or creating a spa-like feel in bathrooms and bedrooms.

💎 EMBOSSED BLUE GLASS STATEMENT PIECE Crafted in elegant Tianshui blue tinted glass, the ornate diamond lattice and beaded detailing catch and reflect light beautifully. Finished with a vintage-inspired decorative lid to protect the candle from dust, it makes a refined accent for coffee tables, mantels or bedside displays.

📏 PERFECTLY PROPORTIONED & CLEAN BURNING Compact yet impactful size (H 8.5 cm × W 10.5 cm) suits both small and large spaces without overpowering them. Provides approximately 20 hours of burn time, with dual cotton wicks ensuring an even melt pool and consistent fragrance throw.

♻️ REUSABLE KEEPSAKE JAR Designed to last beyond the candle. Once finished, simply clean with warm soapy water and repurpose the heavyweight embossed glass jar for jewellery, cotton pads, desk essentials or bathroom storage—beautiful, practical, and sustainable.

🎁 GIFT READY Part of our curated Silk Road Collection, inspired by historic trade routes and tranquil landscapes. Thoughtfully packaged and ready to gift for housewarmings, birthdays, thank-you gifts or elegant everyday self-care, a timeless choice for candle lovers and home décor enthusiasts.
description: Product description Transform Your Space with Coastal Luxury Discover the serene elegance of our Sea Salt Scented Candle from The Silk Road Collection . Encased in a stunning Tianshui blue embossed glass jar , this premium two-wick candle brings the refreshing essence of ocean breezes and coastal air into your home. Whether you're creating a relaxing sanctuary in your bathroom, adding ambience to your living room, or seeking the perfect thoughtful gift, this luxury candle delivers both visual beauty and captivating fragrance. Vintage-Inspired Design That Captivates The richly tinted blue glass showcases an intricate diamond lattice pattern with delicate beaded embossing that creates mesmerising light play throughout the day. As the candle flickers, the textured surface comes alive with dancing shadows and reflections. The matching decorative lid features the same exquisite detailing, protecting your candle between uses whilst doubling as a charming accent piece. This isn’t just a candle – it’s a conversation starter and a beautiful addition to any interior design scheme. Superior Candle Performance Crafted with dual cotton wicks for optimal fragrance distribution, this candle measures H 8.5cm × W 10.5cm × D 10.5cm – the perfect size for bedside tables, bathroom shelves, or coffee table displays. Enjoy approximately 20 hours of clean, even burning with our carefully formulated wax blend. The twin-wick design ensures complete wax consumption from edge to edge, eliminating tunnelling whilst maximising your sea salt fragrance throughout its lifetime. A Gift That Keeps Giving Once the wax has melted away, your beautiful embossed glass jar begins its second life as a decorative storage container. Use it for jewellery organisation, cotton wool pads, guest bathroom amenities, or desk trinkets. The heavyweight glass construction and timeless vintage aesthetic ensure this piece remains a cherished part of your home long after the fragrance fades. The Silk Road Collection Inspired by ancient trade routes that connected East and West, our Silk Road Collection celebrates craftsmanship, exotic fragrances, and timeless design. Each candle arrives carefully packaged, ready to delight recipients for birthdays, housewarmings, Mother’s Day, or simply as a luxurious treat for yourself. Elevate your everyday moments with this exquisite blend of form, function, and fragrance. Safety Warning Trim wick to 5mm before each use and allow wax to melt completely across surface during first burn to prevent tunnelling
